zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hill於1470年出生在英國薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親Sir Roger Hill42歲，母親Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton30歲。他於1494年與Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1532年5月24日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hill于1470年出生在英国薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲Sir Roger Hill42岁，母亲Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton30岁。他于1494年与Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1532年5月24日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hill was born in 1470, in Taunton, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Roger Hill, was 42 and his mother, Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton, was 30. He married Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham in 1494, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 May 1532, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hill est né en 1470, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Hill, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham en 1494, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1532, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hill 1470 in Taunton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Hill 42 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton 30. Er hat 1494 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Mai 1532 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Taunton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hill è nato il nel 1470 nel Taunton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Hill, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham nel 1494, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1532, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Taunton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Hillが1470年にイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Hillは42歳，母Lady Alice Wood of Spaxtonは30歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンでLady Eleanor Somerset Buckinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1532年5月24日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hill(이)가 1470년 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Hill(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1532년 5월 24일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hill nasceu em 1470, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Hill, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham em 1494, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1532, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hill родился в 1470 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Hill было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham в 1494 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 мая 1532 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Hill nació en 1470, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Hill, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham en 1494, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1532, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
